ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce pre-encryption impact chain (vssadmin + wbadmin + bcdedit + service-stop within 10m)
ucs.description: Hunts the characteristic DragonForce ransomware (LockBit Black / Conti-builder derived) pre-encryption sequence: Volume Shadow Copy deletion, BCD recovery flags wiped, backup catalogs purged, and Veeam/SQL/Exchange services stopped — all chained in a single batch script seconds before the locker runs. Distinct from generic vssadmin alerts because it requires 2+ inhibit-recovery actions in a tight window on the same host/user, matching the all-in-one impact script DragonForce affiliates have dropped in the M&S, Co-op and Harrods 2025 intrusions.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count, values(Processes.process) as cmdlines, values(Processes.process_name) as impact_bins, values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parents, min(_time) as first_seen, max(_time) as last_seen from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.user!="*$" AND ((Processes.process_name="vssadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*shadows*") OR (Processes.process_name="wbadmin.exe" AND Processes.process="*delete*catalog*") OR (Processes.process_name="bcdedit.exe" AND (Processes.process="*recoveryenabled*no*" OR Processes.process="*bootstatuspolicy*ignoreallfailures*")) OR (Processes.process_name="wmic.exe" AND Processes.process="*shadowcopy*delete*") OR (Processes.process_name="net.exe" AND Processes.process="*stop*" AND (Processes.process="*veeam*" OR Processes.process="*backup*" OR Processes.process="*sql*" OR Processes.process="*mssql*" OR Processes.process="*exchange*" OR Processes.process="*sophos*")) OR (Processes.process_name="sc.exe" AND Processes.process="*config*" AND Processes.process="*disabled*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user _time span=10m | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | where mvcount(impact_bins) >= 2 | sort - last_seen
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "vssadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("delete","shadows"))
    or (FileName =~ "wbadmin.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "delete" and ProcessCommandLine has "catalog")
    or (FileName =~ "bcdedit.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("recoveryenabled no","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
    or (FileName =~ "wmic.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
    or (FileName =~ "net.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "stop" and ProcessCommandLine has_any ("veeam","backup","sql","mssql","exchange","sophos","defender"))
    or (FileName =~ "sc.exe" and ProcessCommandLine has "config" and ProcessCommandLine has "disabled")
| summarize ImpactBinaries = make_set(FileName, 10),
            CmdLines = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 15),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 5),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen = max(Timestamp),
            EventCount = count()
            by DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, 10m)
| where array_length(ImpactBinaries) >= 2
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend Bin_lc = tolower(NewProcessName), Cmd_lc = tolower(CommandLine)
| where (Bin_lc endswith "\\vssadmin.exe" and Cmd_lc has_all ("delete","shadows"))
    or (Bin_lc endswith "\\wbadmin.exe" and Cmd_lc has "delete" and Cmd_lc has "catalog")
    or (Bin_lc endswith "\\bcdedit.exe" and Cmd_lc has_any ("recoveryenabled no","bootstatuspolicy ignoreallfailures"))
    or (Bin_lc endswith "\\wmic.exe" and Cmd_lc has_all ("shadowcopy","delete"))
    or (Bin_lc endswith "\\net.exe" and Cmd_lc has "stop" and Cmd_lc has_any ("veeam","backup","sql","mssql","exchange","sophos","defender"))
    or (Bin_lc endswith "\\sc.exe" and Cmd_lc has "config" and Cmd_lc has "disabled")
| summarize ImpactBinaries = make_set(NewProcessName, 10),
            CmdLines = make_set(CommandLine, 15),
            Parents = make_set(ParentProcessName, 5),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated),
            EventCount = count()
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
| where array_length(ImpactBinaries) >= 2
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.rationale: DragonForce affiliates were observed (NCC, Sophos X-Ops, Microsoft Threat Intel through 2024–2025) running an all-in-one batch that combines vssadmin delete shadows, wbadmin delete catalog, bcdedit recoveryenabled no, and net stop on backup/Veeam/SQL services in seconds. Single-binary detections fire on benign admin work (e.g. SQL maintenance), but the 2+ impact-binaries-in-10m chain is rare outsi

ucs.title: [LLM] DragonForce SimpleHelp RMM exploit chain (CVE-2024-57726/27/28) — SimpleHelp service spawning interpreters or LOLBins
ucs.description: Hunts the DragonForce affiliate access vector that compromised dozens of MSPs in early 2025: post-exploitation abuse of patched SimpleHelp RMM (CVE-2024-57726/57727/57728) where the SimpleHelp service is coerced into spawning powershell/cmd/mshta/msiexec or downloader LOLBins that pull DragonForce loaders down-tenant. Sophos and Heimdal both attribute this exact tradecraft to DragonForce; legitimate SimpleHelp activity rarely spawns scripting hosts.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count, values(Processes.process) as child_cmd, values(Processes.process_path) as child_path, values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmd, min(_time) as first_seen, max(_time) as last_seen from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where (Processes.parent_process_name IN ("Remote Access.exe","SimpleHelp.exe","Simple-Service.exe","SimpleGatewayService.exe","SimpleService.exe") OR Processes.parent_process_path="*\\SimpleHelp\\*" OR Processes.parent_process_path="*\\JWrapper-Remote Access\\*") AND Processes.user!="*$" AND (Processes.process_name IN ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","msiexec.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe") OR Processes.process IN ("*DownloadString*","*Invoke-Expression*","*IEX(*","*-EncodedCommand*","*FromBase64String*","*-w hidden*","*-nop*","*http://*","*https://*")) by Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process _time | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | sort - last_seen
ucs.kql:
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(30d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("Remote Access.exe","SimpleHelp.exe","Simple-Service.exe","SimpleGatewayService.exe","SimpleService.exe")
   or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has @"\SimpleHelp\"
   or InitiatingProcessFolderPath has @"\JWrapper-Remote Access\"
| where FileName in~ ("powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","bitsadmin.exe","certutil.exe","curl.exe","wget.exe","msiexec.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe")
   or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("DownloadString","Invoke-Expression","IEX(","-EncodedCommand","FromBase64String","-w hidden","-nop","http://","https://")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFolderPath,
          ParentCmd = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildImage = FolderPath,
          ChildBin = FileName,
          ChildCmd = ProcessCommandLine,
          SHA256, IsRemote = IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where Account !endswith "$"
| extend Parent_lc = tolower(ParentProcessName), Child_lc = tolower(NewProcessName), Cmd_lc = tolower(CommandLine)
| where Parent_lc has_any ("\\remote access.exe","\\simplehelp.exe","\\simple-service.exe","\\simplegatewayservice.exe","\\simpleservice.exe")
   or Parent_lc has @"\simplehelp\"
   or Parent_lc has @"\jwrapper-remote access\"
| where Child_lc endswith "\\powershell.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\pwsh.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\cmd.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\mshta.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\rundll32.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\regsvr32.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\bitsadmin.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\certutil.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\curl.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\wget.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\msiexec.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\wscript.exe"
   or Child_lc endswith "\\cscript.exe"
   or Cmd_lc has_any ("downloadstring","invoke-expression","iex(","-encodedcommand","frombase64string","-w hidden","-nop","http://","https://")
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: DragonForce SimpleHelp RMM Spawning Interpreter or LOLBin
id: 7e4d2a9c-4b1f-4d2e-9c5a-3a7e1c8b2d4f
status: experimental
description: Detects DragonForce post-exploitation of SimpleHelp RMM (CVE-2024-57726/27/28) where the SimpleHelp service spawns scripting interpreters or download LOLBins.
references:
  - https://www.simple-help.com/kb-01103-security-vulnerabilities
  - https://news.sophos.com/en-us/2025/01/22/simplehelp-vulnerability-exploitation/
author: detection-engineering
date: 2026/05/04
tags:
  - attack.initial_access
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.t1219
  - attack.execution
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1059.003
  - threat.dragonforce
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent_image:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\Remote Access.exe'
      - '\SimpleHelp.exe'
      - '\Simple-Service.exe'
      - '\SimpleGatewayService.exe'
      - '\SimpleService.exe'
  parent_path:
    ParentImage|contains:
      - '\SimpleHelp\'
      - '\JWrapper-Remote Access\'
  child_bin:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
      - '\bitsadmin.exe'
      - '\certutil.exe'
      - '\curl.exe'
      - '\wget.exe'
      - '\msiexec.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
  child_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'DownloadString'
      - 'Invoke-Expression'
      - 'IEX('
      - '-EncodedCommand'
      - 'FromBase64String'
      - '-w hidden'
      - '-nop'
  condition: (parent_image or parent_path) and (child_bin or child_cmd)
falsepositives:
  - Legitimate MSP technician scripting via SimpleHelp (rare; whitelist by technician account / known toolkit hash)
level: high
ucs.rationale: Sophos X-Ops, Heimdal, and Arctic Wolf in Q1 2025 attributed an MSP-targeting wave exploiting SimpleHelp CVE-2024-57726/27/28 specifically to DragonForce affiliates dropping their leaked-LockBit-builder locker. SimpleHelp.exe / Remote Access.exe spawning interpreters is the textbook IOA for that exploit — legit RMM use cases run installers/native binaries, not powershell -nop -w hidden -EncodedCom

_field_issues.message: `IsInitiatingProcessRemoteSession` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents. Did you mean `InitiatingProcessTokenElevation`?
